governance_status_note: Both AMPRegistry.owner and AMPSettlement.owner are now the AMPTimelock address (verified on-chain). Every economic owner action (setSettlement, pause, withdrawFees, updateProtocolFeeBps, updateProtocolFeeRecipient) requires schedule → 1h delay → execute through the timelock. The deployer EOA key (0x95CC...077a) is the timelock proposer/executor — multisig onboarding for the proposer role is tracked in the Roadmap v0.4 milestone.
deployer_disclosure: Fuji deployer key is a single EOA (0x95CC495dF579981d3Ffa4a8f77B93A17563E077a) generated fresh for this deploy and funded from the public Fuji faucet. Multisig onboarding for the timelock governor role is tracked in the Roadmap v0.4 milestone; until then, the deployer EOA controls the timelock proposer role (but cannot make instant economic changes — all schedule+delay+execute).
